title: Jordan Rivera
description: IT Director responding to a critical Order Processing Agent policy breach in DM with Mission Control Agent—Mission Control split view, remediation, traffic control, retrain, deploy, and fleet digest

overrides.introInstructions: You're Jordan in a DM with Mission Control Agent. Review the critical alert, open Mission Control (split view: tower + chat), run remediation—stop traffic, capture & retrain, deploy—and read the App Home fleet digest.
